title: Publish storage growth and lifecycle health to Leitstand
goal: Collect hourly totals and daily producer detail, retain a bounded time series, and expose growth, top producers, unowned artifacts, expired retention and blocked cleanup candidates to Leitstand.

approval.note: Source changes and read-only verification are authorized. Runtime deletion or cleanup effects require a fresh exact-target plan and post-readback.

acceptance.assertion: Hourly and daily observations are bounded and monotonic in schema, not unbounded file append.
Leitstand shows total use, 24-hour growth, top producers, budget violations and cleanup blockers.
The surface distinguishes observed, estimated and unavailable values.
Threshold crossings produce one deduplicated notification rather than repeated noise.

metadata.source: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1 plan from live 2026-07-14 storage audit
does_not_establish: permission to bypass leases or dirty-state guards
metadata.readiness_basis: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1-T006 verified by merged Heim-PC PR #48, exact current main readback, green CI and a current fail-closed no-write maintenance plan.
validation: TypeScript typecheck, ESLint, focused storage-health tests, the complete Leitstand test suite and production build passed.
Repository structure, documentation relations, generated files, staged drift gates, observer invariant and runbook invariants passed.
GitHub build, repository-root, templates, both security scans and Cloudflare Pages checks passed on the exact reviewed head.
Two isolated real Heim-PC bridge runs and two productive systemd collector runs kept one hourly bucket, one daily bucket and five notifications within the same hour.

verified_acceptance.timeseries: The schema replaces the same UTC hour and day buckets, keeps strictly monotonic unique keys and enforces 168/90/128 default windows plus hard outer and nested payload maxima. Two live runs in one hour remained hourly=1, daily=1.
verified_acceptance.surface: The live /storage-health route exposes total use, temporary storage, 24-hour growth, top producers, budget violations, unowned artifacts and cleanup blockers from the canonical artifact.
verified_acceptance.truth: The contract and controller require observed, estimated or unavailable truth values. The first productive 24-hour growth value remained correctly unavailable because no historical baseline yet existed.
verified_acceptance.alerts: State transitions are retained once and repeated unchanged observations do not append noise. Two live runs remained at five notifications.

completion.outcome: Leitstand now consumes bounded read-only Heim-PC storage evidence, renders explicit truth states and deduplicates threshold notifications through an active commit-bound hourly collector without granting cleanup authority.
